top_signals.title: While Musk's Neuralink drills into skulls, China's BrainCo bets the future of brain tech is wearable
top_signals.summary: Interest in brain-computer interfaces is rising as it promises to help people with compromised neural abilities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
